markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Screening interview for an Account Strategist role.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Client-Facing Experience:** Transitioned from a Conductor consultant to a client-facing Account Manager (AM) for 48 local SEO accounts, directly managing relationships and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [**Upsell Strategy:** Proactively developing an upsell strategy to sell AI content services by demonstrating how current work (e.g., location pages) improves AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [**AI Process Automation:** Automated manual tasks (e.g., service descriptions) using a proprietary AI tool, increasing productivity and enabling more customized client content.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - [**Adaptability Required:** The company is rapidly scaling to $13M ARR and transitioning to a tech-enabled platform, requiring candidates with flexibility and strong instincts to succeed.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=1912.0)

## Topics

### The Role: Account Strategist

  - [**Context:** Rapid growth ($13M ARR) is driving the need to scale the services delivery org.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [**Structure:** The org is evolving, but the core team includes:](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
      - [**Editor:** Human review of AI-generated content.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [**Account Strategist:** Owns the day-to-day client relationship, data analysis, and delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
      - [**Director:** Provides high-level strategic alignment with client business goals.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
  - [**Platform Transition:** The company is shifting from a service-heavy model to a tech-enabled platform.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)
      - [**Upcoming Features:** An AI visibility tool and a collaborative client platform for editing.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
      - [**Implication:** Success requires flexibility and strong instincts, as roles will inevitably change.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=1912.0)

### Candidate Background & Experience

  - [**Conductor (Consultant):** Started as a local SEO strategist for WeWork, then transitioned to a consultant role.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
      - [**Focus:** Provided SEO expertise to help clients maximize platform value and supported upsells with data projections (e.g., CTR-based traffic forecasts).](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [**Current Role (Account Manager):** Manages 48 local SEO accounts at a US-based digital agency.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
      - [**Focus:** Direct client contact, strategy, and reporting on leads and revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
      - [**Promotion:** Promoted to AM in 4 months, citing readiness for the role.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)

### Upsell & Renewal Strategy

  - [**Current Focus:** Developing an upsell strategy for AI content services.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [**Method:** Demonstrate how current work (e.g., location pages) improves AI visibility (e.g., in Google AI Overviews).](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [**Goal:** Use this proof to sell a dedicated AI content management service.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [**Conductor Example:** Supported upsells by projecting traffic growth from new keywords using CTR-based forecasts.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)

### AI & Content Workflow

  - [**Current Process:** Uses a proprietary AI tool to automate tasks and create content.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
      - [**Automation:** Replaced manual work (e.g., writing 20-30 service descriptions) with AI-driven workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
      - [**Customization:** Creates client-specific AI chats with personas and brand guidelines to generate tailored content.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [**Content Creation:**](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
      - [**Short-form:** Generated directly by the AM using the AI tool.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
      - [**Long-form:** Briefed to the copyright team for creation.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)

### Constructive Feedback & Response

  - [**Feedback:** Received feedback to provide more frequent, step-by-step updates to clients.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [**Rationale:** To manage expectations during delays (e.g., waiting on Google support) and demonstrate the complexity of the work.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [**Response:** Implemented a daily review of ongoing tasks to ensure proactive client communication.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bridget:** Discuss with Tucker and provide a decision by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/Jq1gbPwzKmPuHWRb5TJpR3RrmDkCRsog?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
